question: Find the name of the employee who got the highest one time bonus.
gold_sql: SELECT t1.name FROM employee AS t1 JOIN evaluation AS t2 ON t1.Employee_ID  =  t2.Employee_ID ORDER BY t2.bonus DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_2 JOIN table_2 AS T3 ON T2.col_1 = T3.col_1 ORDER BY T3.col_2 DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_2 JOIN table_2 AS T3 ON T2.col_1 = T3.col_1 ORDER BY T3.col_2 DESC LIMIT 1;
